texto: Out of humility I label not myself or others. All I can say is this
autor: God is my Father. Jesus is my Savior. And the Holy Spirit dwells in me.
explicacao: Citação de God is my Father. Jesus is my Savior. And the Holy Spirit dwells in me. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Out of humility I label not myself or others. All I can say is this” articula reflexao, tom-krause, humility em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
